column2:
f in C^{n + 1}(I), a in I
existe M in R^+, pour tout t in I, |f^(n + 1)(t)| =< M

pour tout x in I, |f(x) - sum(k = 0, n)(f^(k)(a)/k! • (x - a)^k| =< M • |x - a|^{n + 1} / (n + 1)!

f continue sur I, a, b in I,

|integrale(a, b)(f)| =< |integrale(a, b)|f||

S1 = (b - a) / n • sum(k = 0, n - 1)(f(a + k • (b - a) / n))

S2 = (b - a) / n • sum(k = 1, n)(f(a + k • (b - a) / n))

limS1 = limS2 = integrale(a, b)(f)
AVEC f CONTINUE
